description: Kafka consumer/producer performance, Spring listener latency, MongoDB command latency, consumer lag, consumer throughput, producer error rate, and processing activity.

panels.title: Consumer Lag — Max
panels.description: Maximum consumer lag across all partitions for job-worker.

panels.title: Records Consumed/s (job-worker)
panels.description: Current record consumption rate for job-worker.

panels.title: Records Produced/s (job-producer)
panels.description: Current record production rate for job-producer.

panels.title: Kafka Listener p99 (job-worker)
panels.description: 99th percentile Spring Kafka listener processing latency for job-worker.

panels.title: MongoDB p99 Latency (dlq-service)
panels.description: 99th percentile MongoDB driver command latency for dlq-service.

panels.title: Jobs Saved to MongoDB (Range)

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="dlq"} |= "Failed job persisted to DLQ repository" [$__range]))

panels.description: Total DLQ jobs persisted to MongoDB over the dashboard time range.

panels.title: Kafka Lag Trend
panels.description: Trend of the maximum Kafka consumer lag across the selected applications.

panels.title: Records Consumed Rate by Topic (job-worker)
panels.description: Kafka record consumption rate by topic for job-worker.

panels.title: Consumer Lag by Topic — Current & Max
panels.description: Consumer lag (current and max) by topic for job-worker. Rising lag indicates consumers falling behind.

panels.title: Kafka Consumer Bytes Consumed Rate (job-worker)
panels.description: Bytes consumed per second by topic for job-worker.

panels.title: Records Consumed Rate by Topic (dlq-service)
panels.description: Kafka record consumption rate by topic for dlq-service.

panels.title: Consumer Lag by Topic (dlq-service)
panels.description: Consumer lag (current and max) by topic for dlq-service.

panels.title: Consumer Fetch Rate (Partitions Assigned)
panels.description: Aggregate record consumption rate comparing job-worker and dlq-service.

panels.title: Consumer Lag Growth Rate (records/s) — All Services
panels.description: Rate of change of consumer lag (deriv of lag_max). Positive → lag growing (consumers falling behind). Negative → lag shrinking (consumers catching up). Near-zero → stable. Alerts should fire when this stays positive for >2 min.

panels.title: Kafka Listener Latency — p50/p90/p95/p99 (job-worker)
panels.description: p50/p90/p95/p99 Spring Kafka listener latency for job-worker.

panels.title: Kafka Listener Latency — p50/p90/p95/p99 (dlq-service)
panels.description: p50/p90/p95/p99 Spring Kafka listener latency for dlq-service.

panels.title: Kafka Listener Processing Rate (job-worker, records/s processed)
panels.description: Spring Kafka listener processing throughput for job-worker (records/s).

panels.title: Kafka Listener Mean Latency — All Consumers
panels.description: Mean Spring Kafka listener latency comparing job-worker and dlq-service.

panels.title: Kafka Send Rate by Application
panels.description: Kafka producer record send rate for job-producer and retry-dispatcher.

panels.title: Kafka Producer Request Latency avg (ms)
panels.description: Average Kafka producer request latency for job-producer and retry-dispatcher.

panels.title: Kafka Producer Error Rate (records/s)
panels.description: Kafka producer record error rate for job-producer and retry-dispatcher.

panels.title: Producer Errors %
panels.description: Ratio of Kafka producer record errors to total records sent across all producers.

panels.title: Kafka Template Send Latency — retry-dispatcher (p50/p90/p95/p99)
panels.description: p50/p90/p95/p99 Spring Kafka template send latency for retry-dispatcher.

panels.title: Kafka Consumer Bytes Consumed Rate — All Services
panels.description: Bytes consumed per second by application across all Kafka consumer services.

panels.title: MongoDB Command Latency — p50/p90/p95/p99
panels.description: p50/p90/p95/p99 MongoDB driver command latency for dlq-service.

panels.title: MongoDB Commands/s by Operation (Success vs Failed)
panels.description: MongoDB command throughput by operation, separating successful from failed commands.

panels.title: MongoDB Mean Latency by Command
panels.description: Mean MongoDB driver command latency broken down by command type.

panels.title: MongoDB Failed Commands Rate
panels.description: MongoDB failed command rate by command type for dlq-service.

panels.title: MongoDB Reads/s by Command
panels.description: MongoDB read command throughput (find, findAndModify, getMore, count, distinct, aggregate) for dlq-service, successful operations/s only.

panels.title: MongoDB Writes/s by Command
panels.description: MongoDB write command throughput (insert, update, delete, findAndModify, bulkWrite, replace) for dlq-service, successful operations/s only.

panels.title: job-worker — Jobs Processed vs Failed
panels.description: Log-based rate of jobs processed, failed, and scheduled for retry by job-worker.

panels.title: DLQ Saves & retry-dispatcher Requeue Rate

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="dlq"} |= "Failed job persisted to DLQ repository" [$__interval]))

panels.description: Log-based rate of DLQ saves, successful requeues, and retry polling by retry-dispatcher.

panels.title: Job Flow: Produced vs Worker Consumed vs DLQ
panels.description: Compares the rate of jobs published by job-producer with the rate consumed by job-worker (first attempt + retries) and the rate landing in the DLQ. A rising DLQ line or growing gap between produced and consumed indicates a problem.

panels.title: Kafka & MongoDB Activity Logs

targets.expr: {job=~"job-worker|dlq|retry-dispatcher"} |~ "(Consuming.*message|Job processed successfully|Job processing failed|DLQ job persisted|Failed job persisted|Job requeued successfully|Failed to requeue|Failed to persist DLQ)"

panels.description: Live stream of Kafka and MongoDB activity logs from consumer/processing services.

title: Chrono Queue — Kafka & MongoDB
